calendar.matters:
Motion For Early Settlement Conference; Certification Of Counsel
Off Calendar Jun-28-2006 Off Calendar

Petition For Money Due On Promissory Note
Off Calendar Jun-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Nelson Wild appearing for petitioner. Leslie Brown appearing for respondent Rosemarie Wagner. She is appearing for her law partner Jim Stillman which is ill. Parties had some settlement discussion but no resolution. The respondent has file a motion for early settlement conference and it is set for hearing on 6/28. Court sees no more evidentary question that warrants a trial. Petition is granted. Ms. Brown to review the order before the court signs it. The 6/28 hearing is off calendar. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Money Due On Promissory Note
Off Calendar Jun-05-2006 Continued To Jun-26-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
